criteria.requirement: Every version-pointer CAS is logged to the WAL before being applied
covered_by: walCAS implementation (WAL append precedes CompareAndSwapCurrentVersion call, structurally via wal.AppendAndApply)

criteria.requirement: WAL record precedes pointer visibility (test spec, -race)
covered_by: TestVersionCASWAL/wal_before_apply_ordering: hook observes WAL durable while cat.Get(fileID).CurrentVersion still old

criteria.requirement: Crash-inject mid-CAS; recovery reconstructs a valid pointer
covered_by: TestVersionCASWAL/crash_mid_cas_torn_record_discarded: torn WAL tail discarded, recovered CurrentVersion == last valid committed version

criteria.requirement: No lost updates / no doomed WAL records for losing CAS attempts
covered_by: walCAS design: re-verify expected under commit lock BEFORE any WAL write; losing attempts never touch the WAL
TestCurrentVersionCAS (existing, 2a.1.2) still green with new w *wal.Writer param threaded through
go test ./engine/mvcc/... -race -count=1 (all existing tests, TestVersionWriter, TestCurrentVersionCAS, TestSnapshotRead, TestSnapshotReadNoVersionCommitted)

criteria.requirement: No regression on engine/catalog RecoverFromWAL / existing catalog tests
